productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girls Party Frock Pink Dress
description: Composition Pink sleeveless round neck frock made of A blended fabric, has mesh and cotton lining, has satin floral embellishment appliqued on the right shoulder, petal-shaped fabric embellishments around the waist, soft cushioned flower on the waist, a pink satin belt and a zipper at the back with a pink faux pearl necklace Fit Reuglar Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Warm iron Every mother loves to dress up her bundle of joy as a little pink princess. This frock from doodle will make your little one look like a miniature version of princesses in the fairy tales you read her to sleep. Pair it with pink sandals from crocs and a cute hairband.
